person.name: Ed Estrela Dantas
person.headline: ...helping developers build with confidence
person.bio: I design infrastructure with a strict focus on automation, security, and compliance, ensuring engineering teams can ship code safely and at scale.

maps.label: Where am I in this world?

employment.title: Software Engineer
employment.description: Refactored the feature flag system using LaunchDarkly, reducing toggle setup time by 83%. Contributed to SAP Joule skills development for BMW, overseeing repo and CI/CD pipeline. Defined and enforced frontend coding guidelines across teams via code reviews and workshops. Conducted 4 internal workshops focused on advanced React, testing, and code quality. Collaborated cross-team to ensure scalable UI architecture in a shared monorepo. Coaching junior developers.
employment.tech: TypeScript, React, LaunchDarkly, Storybook, GitHub Actions, CI/CD, Monorepos

employment.title: Software Engineer
employment.description: Led code audits to identify and present architectural anti-patterns before third-party handover. Built car rental search module for OTA platform using Angular 10 and NgRx. Contributed to a component library and back-office portal in a cost-cutting rotation during COVID-19. Published internal blog posts on Firebase testing, E2E automation, and Vue/Firebase auth flows.
employment.tech: Angular 10, NgRx, Node.js, Firebase, Vue.js, Sass, Postman, Jest

employment.title: Software Engineer
employment.description: Co-authored React-based UI component library using Styled Components + Storybook. Defined global UI programming guidelines for all frontend teams across the org. Mentored the team's first intern, who later received a full-time contract. Delivered talk on Functional Programming with Ramda at internal meetup.
employment.tech: React, Styled Components, Redux, Storybook, Webpack, Jest, Ramda

employment.title: Software Engineer
employment.description: Developed NPM package to embed static SSRS reports inside Angular apps. Modernized internal KPIs dashboard from AngularJS to Angular 5. Demoed product iterations at sprint reviews for cross-functional stakeholders.
employment.tech: Angular 5, AngularJS, RxJS, Jasmine, Karma, Lodash

employment.title: Software Engineer
employment.description: Prototyped and shipped the company's first mobile application using Vue.js and Framework7. Built a proprietary Workflow system in AngularJS and Bootstrap. Automated data extraction from legacy systems using a C# scraper and cron job.
employment.tech: AngularJS, Vue.js, Framework7, ASP.NET, Quartz, PL/SQL, Oracle, jQuery
